summary: Easy run — 35 min total. Follow the plan — steady Zone 2 effort.

blocks.name: Warmup
blocks.notes: Easy walk or very light jog — just get the blood moving.

blocks.name: Work
blocks.notes: Conversational pace, HR 125–140. Slow down or walk if HR climbs above 145.

blocks.name: Cooldown
blocks.notes: Slow to a walk, let heart rate drop naturally.
